relationships.context: Checks Gmail every 5-15 minutes for emails matching [Reflect] pattern
Script controls enabling, disabling, and status checking of the system
Email subject containing [Reflect] plus audio attachment triggers the workflow
Configuration file controls drive folder ID and email lookback interval
Script is part of the N5 scripts infrastructure
